## Idea summary
Briefly describe the idea.

## Expected benefit
What measurable improvement do you expect (for example: log loss, calibration, robustness)?

## Why it might work
What is the mechanism or reasoning behind the idea?

## Idea type
- [ ] New model idea
- [ ] New feature family
- [ ] New simulation approach
- [ ] New leaderboard strategy thought

## Dependencies
- Data dependencies:
- Feature dependencies:
- Code/module dependencies:
- Prior experiments or decisions:

## Risks
What could fail, regress, or add maintenance cost?

## How to test it
- Validation design:
- Baseline comparison:
- Success criteria:
- MLflow tags to use:

## Notes
Any additional context, links, or follow-up tasks.
